title: Vanilla QoL
description: Extra performance enhancements and QoL additions to make Minecraft run better and play better without ruining it!
body:
This Modpack aims to improve Minecraft by adding many Quality of Life improvements and performance enhancements to the game!

Featured Mods:

Sodium to improve performance significantly,

Villager Trade Cycling to save time breaking blocks to get that one trade,

Infinite Villager Trading so you dont need to wait on them,

Tree Harvester and Vein Miner to save time chopping and mining,

And Many More Awesome Mods!

Any mods can be easily removed by going into options scrolling down and unlinking the pack then removing the mods.
